56: Thanks to the remarkable efforts of those involved, the Gleamslope interior is now accessible via the Piercingway Tunnel. Preliminary drone scans have identified the area as a potential source of useful raw materials. Based on the visual data received, we now seek to conduct a thorough survey of the sector and obtain samples for further study. It is hoped that this initial foray will underpin future exploration and planning efforts.
